_comment: CARICOM Classification Rules - General product patterns, not brand-specific

rules.notes: Chapter 42 - Articles of leather; saddlery and harness; travel goods, handbags
Chapter 34 - Organic surface-active products for washing the skin
Chapter 34 - Organic surface-active products for washing the skin (liquid form)
Chapter 34 - Soap in bars/cakes. Lower priority so liquid soap rule matches first
Chapter 33 - Perfumes, toilet waters, body splashes and fragrance mists
Nail gels, gel polishes, nail treatments - manicure/pedicure preparations ch33
Acrylic nail powders, monomers, primers - manicure/pedicure preparations ch33
Nail adhesives used in manicure - classified as nail preparations ch33
Cosmetic/beauty oils for hair and body care, NOT food-grade crude oils (ch15)
Battery chargers and charging pads - Chapter 85
Sandals, flip-flops, thong-type footwear. Includes Reef brand model names.
Chain and parts thereof - iron/steel Chapter 73
Other cast articles of iron/steel Chapter 73
Electric conductors, insulated, for voltage <= 1000V Chapter 85
Other electric lamps and lighting fittings Chapter 94
Instruments for measuring voltage, current, resistance or power Chapter 90
Marine paints 3208.90.20 - Budget Marine is a yacht supplies shop, all paints classified as marine
Paints/varnishes based on acrylic/vinyl polymers Chapter 32
Rod/reel combos classified by rod Chapter 95
Cooking appliances for gas fuel Chapter 73 - complete units only, not parts
Self-adhesive plastic tape in rolls Chapter 39
Cable sealing fittings, plastic articles Chapter 39
O-rings and gaskets, vulcanized rubber Chapter 40
Abrasive products on textile backing Chapter 68
Gas/vapor filter cartridges for respirators Chapter 84
Bosun's chairs - textile rigging articles Chapter 63
Macerator pumps for marine toilets Chapter 84
Toilet paper of cellulose wadding Chapter 48
Marine toilet parts and service kits Chapter 84
Glasses straps/retainers - made-up textile articles Chapter 63
Chapter 94 - Furniture; wooden bedroom furniture including bed frames, headboards
Chapter 94 - Mattresses; of cellular rubber or plastics (foam)
Chapter 94 - Furniture; wooden furniture for living room including TV stands, consoles
Chapter 57 - Carpets and other textile floor coverings; tufted
Chapter 39 - Plastic articles for household use; dispensers for bathroom
Chapter 85 - Electrical machines and apparatus; ultraviolet insect killers
Chapter 73 - Iron or steel articles; curtain rods, household hardware
Chapter 34 - Baby wipes are soap-based cleaning products
Chapter 96 - Diapers and similar baby sanitary products (CET 9619.00.29)
Chapter 21 - Food supplements and herbal preparations
Chapter 30 - Medicaments for therapeutic or prophylactic uses
Chapter 34 - Organic surface-active products for washing the skin
Safety/signal lights — Chapter 85 signaling equipment parts, NOT eye makeup
Air/signal horns — Chapter 92 signaling instruments, NOT clothing
Magnetic pick-up tools — Chapter 82 hand tools, NOT combs
Fishing accessories — Chapter 95 fishing tackle, NOT press-fasteners
Paint rollers/covers — Chapter 96 paint rollers, NOT hair rollers

cleaning_over_cosmetics.description: Cleaning products go to Chapter 34, NOT Chapter 33
